instruction: Change the function to return the absolute index (within `nums`) of the maximum element in each sliding window, instead of the maximum value itself. For a window starting at position `i`, append `i + argmax(nums[i:i+k])` to the result, where ties are broken by choosing the leftmost (smallest index) maximum. Returns an empty list under the same conditions as the original (empty nums, k < 1, or k > len(nums)).
